top3.sql:
SELECT L1_model, COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM (
    SELECT L1_model FROM model
    UNION ALL
    SELECT L1_model FROM stack_ok
) AS combined_models
GROUP BY L1_model
ORDER BY total_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT L1_model, COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM model
GROUP BY L1_model
ORDER BY total_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT L1_model, COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM (
    SELECT L1_model FROM model
    UNION ALL
    SELECT L1_model FROM stack_ok
) AS combined_models
GROUP BY L1_model
ORDER BY total_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH model_counts AS (
    SELECT L1_model, COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM model
    GROUP BY L1_model
)
SELECT L1_model, total_count
FROM model_counts
WHERE total_count = (SELECT MAX(total_count) FROM model_counts);

WITH combined_models AS (
    SELECT L1_model FROM model
    UNION ALL
    SELECT L1_model FROM stack_ok
)
SELECT L1_model, COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM combined_models
GROUP BY L1_model
ORDER BY total_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT L1_model, COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM (
    SELECT L1_model FROM model
    UNION ALL
    SELECT L1_model FROM stack_ok
) AS combined_models
GROUP BY L1_model
ORDER BY total_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH model_counts AS (
    SELECT L1_model, COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM model
    GROUP BY L1_model
)
SELECT L1_model, total_count
FROM model_counts
WHERE total_count = (SELECT MAX(total_count) FROM model_counts);

WITH model_category_counts AS (
    SELECT L1_model, COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count
    FROM model
    GROUP BY L1_model
)
SELECT L1_model, occurrence_count
FROM model_category_counts
ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT L1_model, COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM (
    SELECT L1_model FROM model
    UNION ALL
    SELECT L1_model FROM stack_ok
) AS combined_models
GROUP BY L1_model
ORDER BY total_count DESC
LIMIT 1;
